name: Peanut Butter Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup skim milk, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. To prepare the crust, in a mixing bowl, combine crumbs, margarine, and granulated sugar. Press into a 9-inch pie pan.
3. Bake for 10 minutes and set aside.
4. To prepare the filling, in another mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, powdered sugar, milk, peanut butter, and vanilla.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared pie pan.
6. Chill covered for 4 hours.
